race.description: Gosford Air Conditioning Super Mdn Hcp
race.comment: FLYING ARTISAM (2) opened this prep with a couple of placings at the provincials then did a bit of work and tired late over 1250m at Canterbury last start. Can improve sharply in a maiden without a great deal of depth. SACHI (14) was handy enough on the bend but lacked a change of gears when resuming over 1200m at Kembla last time out. Yet to fill a placing in eight runs but her best figures read okay in a race of this quality. SNITZEL MISS (1) started favourite and had every chance but was edged out of a maiden win over 1400m at Kembla recently. Has had a few chances but this looks a very nice assignment for her. OPINE (8) was safely held on the Canberra Acton track at his last appearance eight days ago. Worth another chance back on turf. MERINI (4) is going okay in town but should be much more effective in this company.
